description_first_500:
Unleash your creativity and take control of your plans with Craft, a productivity app that transforms how you write, organize, and get things done. Create structured documents, manage tasks, organize your knowledge with Collections, and chat about it all with the AI Assistant. With seamless sync across iPhone, iPad, Mac, and the web, your workspace is always ready, online or offline.

WRITE ANYWHERE, ANYTIME

Your best ideas don’t wait for an internet connection. Work seamlessly offline with ful
